name: airplay_watchdog
description: Conservative watchdog and recovery for Volumio's AirPlay receiver

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check lib/watchdog.js && node --check lib/volumio-adapter.js && node --check test/run.js

author: Volumio community

volumio_info.details: Monitors Volumio's built-in Shairport Sync receiver and performs bounded, playback-aware recovery.
volumio_info.changelog: 1.0.1: Declare compatibility with Volumio 4 while retaining Volumio 3 support.
